decoder_heading: My Elevation Privacy Policy
ident_heading: My Elevation Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: My Elevation Privacy PolicyMy Elevation Privacy PolicyRDH Software built the My Elevation application as an Ad Supported application. This application is provided by                    RDH Software at no cost and is intended for use as is.This page is used to inform visitors regarding our policies with the collection, use, and disclosure                    of Personal Information if anyone decided to use our application.

decoder_heading: My Elevation Privacy Policy
ident_heading: My Elevation Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: If you choose to use our application, then you agree to the collection and use of information in                    relation to this policy. The information that we collect is used for providing and improving                    the application. You do not have to provide personal information to use our application. If you choose to provide personal information, such as by sending an e-mail, we will use the information you provide to respond to you.  We will not use or share your information with anyone except as described

decoder_heading: My Elevation Privacy Policy
ident_heading: My Elevation Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: in this Privacy Policy.The terms used in this Privacy Policy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions, which is                    accessible at My Elevation unless otherwise defined in this Privacy Policy.

decoder_heading: Information Collection and Use
ident_heading: Information Collection and Use
heading_content_part: Information Collection and Use

decoder_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
ident_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
heading_content_part: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information, including but not limited to your computer's IP address and         location. This information is anonymized (it does not personally identify you) and is used only to support the core functions of the application and to help RDH Software debug the application in case of a crash or other error in the application.

decoder_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
ident_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
heading_content_part: The application does use third party services that may collect information used to identify you. Links to privacy policies of third party service providers used by the application are listed below.Google ServicesGoogle Play Services- This is a core part of many other applications typically used on Android devices. My Elevation uses Google Play Services to support the maps you see in the application. I also uses them to find your location if you choose to use "Follow Me" mode.  The application can be set to not retrieve your location.  To set the application to not retrieve your location go to Preferences, GPS Settings and set the "Use GPS for My Location" switch to Off.

decoder_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
ident_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
heading_content_part: Google AdMob- This service is used to show ads in the application.  We do not offer an ad free version of the application.Firebase Analytics- The data analytics collected contains no identifying or personal data and is anonymous. It is related to what features are used in the application and consumption of the web services we rely on to provide elevation, weather and Wikipedia data. We use this information to determine which features to add or enhance. You may turn off the analytics by going Preferences, Analytics Data and set the "Analytics/Crash Reporting Data Preference" switch to Off.

decoder_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
ident_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
heading_content_part: Elevation - The following third party providers are used for finding elevation for a given location. The application transmits coordinates (lattitude and longitude) to these services based on your location or locations you long press on the map.USGSGovernment of Canada and Natural Resources CanadaGeonamesErsi

decoder_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
ident_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
heading_content_part: Geocoding - The following third party providers are used for finding street addresses shown in the popups that appear when you long-press on the map. The application transmits coordinates to them when you long press on the map. They are also used to find addresses related to the words you enter in the search feature of the application. The application transmits what you type in the search feature to these services.Here MapsLocationIQGoogle Geogoding API

decoder_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
ident_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
heading_content_part: Other Services - The application transmits coordinates to the services below when you long press on the map.OpenweathermapsorGeonamesThese services are used to show weather conditions for the locations you long-press on the map.  You may turn off this feature off by going to Preferences, Additional Data Retrieval and set the "Get Weather Data" switch to Off.Wikipedia

decoder_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
ident_heading: For a better experience, while using our application, we may require you to provide us with certain information
heading_content_part: This service is used to show Wikipedia attractions for the locations you long-press on the map.  You may turn off this feature off by going to Preferences, "Additional Data Retrieval" and set the Show More Info Data switch to Off.Google Street View APIThis service is used to identify street level view information for locations you search or locations you long-press on the map.  You may turn off this feature off by going to Preferences, Additional Data Retrieval and set the "Google Street Level" switch to Off.

decoder_heading: Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers
ident_heading: Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers
heading_content_part: Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers.                    These are sent to your browser from the websites that you visit and are stored on your device's internal                    memory.This application does not use these “cookies” explicitly. However, the application may use third party code and                    libraries that use “cookies” to collect information and improve their services. You have the option to

decoder_heading: Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers
ident_heading: Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers
heading_content_part: either accept or refuse these cookies and know when a cookie is being sent to your device. If you choose                    to refuse our cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of this application.
